dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 14, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
Diamondbacks Walk Off in Thrilling 4-3 Win Over Orioles

In a nail-biting finish, Ildemaro Vargas' 3 RBI performance, including a 3-run home run, propelled the Arizona Diamondbacks to a 4-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles. Merrill Kelly earned the win, while Trevor Rogers took the loss. Grant Wolfram's 1.1 innings of scoreless relief provided crucial support.

Reds Edge Giants in Low-Scoring Affair

The Cincinnati Reds edged the San Francisco Giants 2-1, with Willy Adames hitting his third home run of the season. Robbie Ray tossed 5 strong innings for the Giants, but Brady Singer earned the win for the Reds. Willy Adames' home run proved to be the difference-maker.

Angels Cruise Past Yankees 7-1

Mike Trout and Reid Detmers led the Los Angeles Angels to a 7-1 thrashing of the New York Yankees. Detmers pitched a complete game, striking out 9, while Yoán Moncada hit a 3-run home run for the Angels.
